mapper.sql: lable_code AS lableCode, lable_name AS lableName, parent_code AS parentCode, parent_codes AS parentCodes, tree_sort AS treeSort, tree_sorts AS treeSorts, tree_leaf AS treeLeaf, tree_level AS treeLevel, tree_names AS treeNames, status, create_date AS createDate, update_date AS updateDate, lable_id AS lableId, lable_details_id AS lableDetailsId, rebates, merchants_code AS merchantsCode, show, reson, state
mapper.select: SELECT a.lable_code id,b.label lableName,b.url url FROM app_lable_details_review_tree as a LEFT JOIN app_lable AS b ON a.lable_id = b.id WHERE user_b_id = #{merchantsCode} and tree_level= 1 AND a.state = 1 AND b.id <> 12 AND b.state = 1 AND clean_type is null or trim(clean_type)=''
SELECT MAX(rebates) rebates FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE parent_code = #{id}
SELECT rebates FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE parent_code = #{id}
SELECT MAX(charter_shop) FROM app_business_confirm WHERE user_b_id = #{id}
SELECT lable_name label FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{merchantsCode} AND tree_level = 1 AND state = 1 AND clean_type is null or trim(clean_type)= ''
